## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Smart contract change
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cargo odra test` passes (if contracts changed)
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
